Our Heritage

A century-old institution built on discipline and careশৃঙ্খলা ও যত্নের ঐতিহ্য

Founded in 1900 in Bandar, Narayanganj, BM Union School & College has stood as one of the region's most trusted names in education for more than a hundred years. Generations of families have sent their children through our gates — first as students, then as parents, and often as teachers who returned to give back what they once received.

Today the institution carries three streams under one roof — Secondary, Higher Secondary College, and Bangla Medium — united by the same values that shaped it in 1900: strong fundamentals, moral character, and a genuine curiosity for learning.

Bandar, NarayanganjBangladesh
Since 1900125+ years running
EIIN 112379Registered institution
3 StreamsSecondary · College · Bangla Medium
Principal's Message
"
Our purpose has never simply been to teach a syllabus — it is to build character, curiosity, and confidence that will serve our students long after they leave these gates. For over a century, that has been the quiet promise of BM Union School & College, and it remains ours today.
Principal's Name (placeholder) Principal, BM Union School & College
Academic Programs

Three streams, one standard of excellence

Every stream at BM Union School & College is held to the same standard: strong fundamentals, attentive teaching, and genuine character-building.

Class VI – X

Secondary School

A rigorous, well-rounded secondary curriculum in Bangla and English medium, building the fundamentals students carry through SSC and beyond.

HSC College

Higher Secondary College

Focused, exam-ready college instruction across Science, Business Studies, and Humanities — preparing students for HSC and higher education.

বাংলা মাধ্যম

Bangla Medium

Full Bangla-medium instruction following the national curriculum, taught by experienced teachers who understand every student's pace.

Why Families Choose Us

A century of trust, still growing

125+ Years of Heritage

Founded in 1900, with a reputation built by generations rather than marketing.

Experienced Faculty

Long-serving teachers who know each student by name, not just by roll number.

Modern Facilities

Smart classrooms and science & computer labs alongside a century-old campus.

Discipline & Character

Structure and moral guidance that parents consistently point to as our difference.

Co-curricular Excellence

Scouts, sports, debate, and the arts sit alongside academics, not after it.

A Proven Legacy

Decades of SSC and HSC results from a school that measures success in careers, not just grades.

Admissions

Five simple steps to enroll

1

Inquiry

Call, email, or visit the office to ask about seat availability.

2

Application

Submit the completed admission form with required documents.

3

Assessment

A short written test and/or interview, depending on the class.

4

Result

Selected candidates are notified directly by the school office.

5

Enrollment

Complete fee payment and receive uniform & book guidance.

Contact Admissions Office
